sentences.translation: Rana je veoma zavoljela grad Aleksandriju.
sentences.translationEn: Rana loved the city of Alexandria very much.

sentences.translation: Šetala je po korničeu i uživala u zraku.
sentences.translationEn: She walked on the corniche and enjoyed the breeze.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ سَمَكًا مَشْوِيًّا مِنَ الْبَائِعِ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Kupila je pečenu ribu od prodavca na plaži.
sentences.translationEn: She bought grilled fish from a vendor on the beach.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَتِ السَّمَكَ وَهِيَ تَنْظُرُ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Jela je ribu dok je gledala u more.
sentences.translationEn: She ate the fish while looking at the sea.
